message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

participant "A" as A
participant "CircuitBreaker" as CB
participant "B" as B

alt no errors
    A -> CB : call()
    CB -> B : call()
    activate B
    B --> CB : response
    deactivate B
    CB --> A : response
else errors
    A -> CB : call()
    loop while err_count < max_errors
        CB ->x B : call()
        CB -> CB : err_count ++
        CB -> CB : sleep(timeout)
        CB ->x B : call()
        CB -> CB : sleep(timeout*2)
        CB ->x B : call()
    end
    CB --> A : error
end

@enduml
```
